entity.summary: Sui-native concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange providing token swaps, liquidity positions, routing, cross-chain asset support, gauge incentives, developer tooling, and related trading infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Momentum DEX as a live Sui concentrated-liquidity market maker and central liquidity engine with swaps, liquidity provision, programmable multi-step transactions, incentives, cross-chain support, and a linked public application. No exact launch date is adopted from promotional copy; no legal jurisdiction, legal entity, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Momentum protocol and DEX whitepaper
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Momentum DEX as a Sui concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange supporting swaps, liquidity provision, programmable transaction flows, incentives, and cross-chain asset trading.

evidence.title: Momentum official platform links
evidence.notes: First-party links page identifies the current Momentum website, live application, official developer repository, and community surfaces, supporting current operating status.
